---
title: "GenAI alternatives with VS Code"
subtitle: "..."
date: 2026-07-05
date-modified: today
number-sections: true
toc: true
---

---------

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

::: {.callout-caution appearance="simple"}
**_This page is still subject to change_**
:::

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

## Google Gemini

## Free and local models

- Install the "Kilo Code" extension in VS Code

### Free models

### Local models

```bash
sinteractive -N 1 -g 1 -A PAS3453
```

```bash
module load vllm/0.23.0 

vllm_start google/gemma-3-27b-it
```
```bash-out
VLLM_API_PORT: 52685
```
